name: Snowflake Method
author: Randy Ingermanson
description: Progressive expansion method for plotting novels.
avoid_if: You are a pure 'pantser' (discovery writer) who hates planning.

steps.name: 1. One-Sentence Summary
steps.prompt: Write a one-sentence summary of your novel (approx 15 words).

steps.name: 2. One-Paragraph Summary
steps.prompt: Expand your sentence into a paragraph (approx 5 sentences: setup, disasters, climax).

steps.name: 3. Character Summaries
steps.prompt: Brief summaries for each major character (motivation, goal, conflict, epiphany).

steps.name: 4. One-Page Synopsis
steps.prompt: Expand the one-paragraph summary into a one-page synopsis.

steps.name: 5. Scene List
steps.prompt: List all scenes needed to tell the story.

steps.name: 6. Expanded Scene Notes
steps.prompt: Add details, POV, and goals to each scene in your list.

steps.name: 7. Draft Prep
steps.prompt: Any final notes or research needed before starting the first draft.
